blocking_findings.summary: The first delta implementation used includes('通过'), which could infer pass from non-verdict prose such as 总评：请确保通过复核.

fix_summary.parser: Textual verdict parsing is now limited to explicit conclusion labels followed by one of the allowed verdict values.
tests: explicit prose 不通过 remains blocking
non-verdict prose mentioning 通过 fails closed
fix_summary.large_file_gate: Runner ceiling lowered to 597 with a 447-line follow-up target; original 491-line test did not grow and the new prose shard is 59 lines.

local_gates_before_review: npm run check:large-files: pass with no issues and no warnings
